deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr - Devine
deals.notes: Underwater approximately $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Double-carrying costs $5,300-$6,000 monthly. Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.

Stopped by property, set boundary on lawn care

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path - San Antonio
deals.notes: MLS live May 14. Referral from Isaac Linares. 3BR/2.5BA, June deadline for seller relocation. Hairline foundation crack flagged. Insurance adjuster out, roof claim moving forward. First showing received - cultural concern noted, offered furniture negotiable.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Roof/fascia decision pending with insurance adjuster.

logs.m: MLS live, first showing feedback received, roof update shared with agent and sellers
Insurance adjuster completed inspection, claim moving forward
Listing agreement signed, photos received from ATG Photography

deals.title: 485 W FM 462 - Moore
deals.notes: 4.05 acres, 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft. Prior VA renovation loan. Payoff ~$257K. Thin market - 3 comps in 10 miles. Recommended range $275K-$315K. Net sheet built, CMA completed.

deals.notes: 1,535 sqft, 3BR/2BA, new construction (2025). Grace Gardens community. Rent $1,595/month. Jimbo replied May 14 with all agreement details. WiFi included, W/D hookup, 12-month lease. Tenant covers HOA transfer fee ($450).
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope and send for signatures. Order vinyl signs - Home for Rent and branded sign.
